CustomField.description: How many (if any) retrofit-related knowledge sharing forums has the Wave 3 project team organised or taken part in during Wave 3? These could include conferences, networks, seminars/webinars etc.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How many (if any) retrofit-related knowledge sharing forums has the Wave 3 project team organised or taken part in during Wave 3? These could include conferences, networks, seminars/webinars etc.
CustomField.label: XKnowledge Sharing Forums
